nasb.text: When He had finished speaking with him upon Mount Sinai, He gave Moses the two tablets of the testimony, tablets of stone, written by the finger of God.

esv.text: And he gave to Moses, when he had finished speaking with him on Mount Sinai, the two tablets of the testimony, tablets of stone, written with the finger of God.

cnv.text: 耶和華在西奈山上與摩西說完了話，就把兩塊法版交給他，是　神用指頭寫的石版。

ccb.text: 耶和华在西奈山对摩西说完这些话以后，就把自己用指头刻上诫命的两块石版交给摩西。
